title: Australië lijkt strijd tegen 250 miljoen konijnen te verliezen: "Virussen werken niet meer"

world.title: Australië lijkt strijd tegen 250 miljoen konijnen te verliezen: "Virussen werken niet meer"

environment.compositionIntent: A pale paper Stella field surrounds a central fractured pressure barricade: ordered horizontal registration is pulled against red and teal diagonals, while foreground loops and scratches release the pressure into near space without replacing the middleground news structure.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained for first preview because accepted part evidence was authored around this frontal Stella relief scale.

contrast.notes: Soft warm gallery light preserves flat-poster paper and collage surfaces while black contours, green frame bars, and red-teal diagonals keep focal separation.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the enclosing background shell and active negative paper space.
Environment radius and low fog preserve the accepted pale ochre register-line room without masking the central barricade.
Kept as enclosing pale paper/register-line background and active negative space.
composition modified world-environment from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Preview attempt 3 succeeded with WebGPU renderer health ok and capture ok.

Desktop screenshot shows a dominant full-surround pale paper/ochre Stella-like environment with visible black registration lines, green frame pressure, muted rust pressure field, small high-chroma chips, and background-only diagonal Draw Against tension.
Static check-part-draft passed with no validation errors.

compositionAdaptations: Kept centered as the dominant selected-news pressure structure.
Scale is restrained against the default so the red/teal Draw Against diagonals, compressed grid, and central stress rings remain readable inside the environment field.
Kept centered as the middleground news-pressure barricade with Draw Against diagonals and compressed grid.
composition modified non-literal-fracture-pressure from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the local advisory concept-reference image directly before authoring.
Static check-part-draft succeeded with validation pass true after the final revision.
Attempt 2 Playwright desktop preview succeeded with healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a broad middleground Frank Stella-like relief barricade: pale paper field, green frame bars, opposing red/teal Draw Against diagonals, compressed black grid, jagged fracture seam, central stress rings, and 250 concentrated repeated pressure cells for the rabbit-virus failure pressure.

Attempt 2 render report proved WebGPU backend with MeshBasicMaterial, LineBasicMaterial, color-field, procedural-marks, and InstancedMesh material-factory evidence; nonBlankRatio 0.991781 and dynamicRange 228.667.

avoid: full foreground artist mark field of loops, scratches, drips, splatters, and near-line behavior

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionAdaptations: Kept as a foreground-owned line and material system.
Reduced relative scale and centered slight-right so loops, scratches, drips, and catch marks frame the central fracture instead of becoming a second news-pressure barricade.
Kept as foreground Stella line system, scaled and framed to support rather than replace the pressure barricade.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected local concept reference image directly; used it only for warm paper value, thin register-line density, muted rust center, and broad composition mood.
Static check passed for drafts/artist-mark-field.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Attempt 2 Playwright preview captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-artist-mark-field-draft-desktop.jpg.
Attempt 2 render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json shows healthStatus ok and captureStatus ok.

Preview showed a readable foreground Stella mark field: large near scraped-paper relief, loops crossing outside the plate, scratches, drips, splatter, high-chroma accents, and 250 small catch marks without duplicating the accepted middleground band/grid structure.

Render evidence includes WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial and LineBasicMaterial plus approved native helpers for scraped-paint-grain-material, animated-instanced-mark-field, and animated-point-particle-field.

owns: foreground artist mark and line behavior: loops, scratches, drips, splatters, dot/grid catches, and near readable marks
avoid: another dominant middleground news-pressure band, barricade/grid, or knot structure

compositionEvidence.webgpuCompatibility: Preserved accepted module refs, empty assetRefs, and compatibility refs only; no new shader, GLSL, WebGL-only surface, generated module source, or asset dependency was introduced.
compositionEvidence.motionInterpretation: Optional module motion remains the accepted measured kinetic-diagonal pressure derived from the rabbit-virus news cue; no unrelated animation was added.
